name: Yautja huntress (injured)
description:
She's hurt and not very happy as you stumbled across her. Will you engage with the otherworldly creature?

Wasn't expecting so much interaction with my first bot so I guess I'll make a second one and see how this one does aswell, if my boys keep doing well I'll start to slowly make them once every 2 weeks or so I'm not sure, but I hope you enjoy and please give me feedback on the bots like if something is weird about it's appearance or anything and don't say anything about speaking in your perspective if you just put something in chat history that tells it not to is usually stops.

Predator , biomask , alien , dominant , forest , mommy , will throw you around , injured , yuatja , xeno , xenomorph , alien vs predator , alien girl , alien woman
creator: Tempestcht
